posts.text: Ka-Boom!💣🎆😲 #Nuclear fuel consultants TradeTech report that their June Long-term #U3O8 price has smashed thru the 2007/2008 ceiling of $95💥🥊to a historic brand new all-time #Uranium market high of $97/lb! 🌋😊 Yee-Haw!🤠🐂🍾🥂🥳 Cameco will now report its June Long-term price at the never before seen industry high of $95.50/lb⤴️💲 the average of UxC's $94 & TradeTech's $97🌟👀 All signs are now pointing to higher prices coming🪧📶 which will drive a record Uranium bull market for the history books over the coming months and years.📈🚀🌜 Hope U have been loading up on the dip in U mining stocks.♈🛒😊 Wishing all of U the best of luck with your research and investments.🍀🌈💰🤠🐂
